sharedIcons.description: A pair of footsteps or shoe prints — represents move count in a puzzle game
A star burst or sparkle — represents score/points
A 3D isometric cube — represents the CUBE currency token
A numbered flag or milestone marker — represents current level
A white flag on a pole — represents surrender/quit action

catalogIcons.description: A solid filled 5-pointed star — represents filled rating
An outlined empty 5-pointed star — represents empty rating
A royal crown with 3 points — achievement/rank
A shopping bag or cart — store/shop
A trophy cup with handles — achievement
A padlock in locked position — locked/unavailable
A speaker with sound waves — sound toggle

bonusIcons.description: A grinning jester mask with a pointed three-bell hat, vibrant purple and gold with electric cyan accents. Glowing magical aura around the mask
A blazing golden star with radiating energy beams and trailing sparkle particles, vibrant amber and warm white tones with orange glow
A glowing crystal pickaxe striking a gem, scattering cyan and emerald crystal shards. Vibrant teal and green with white spark highlights
A powerful ocean wave cresting and crashing with white foam spray, vibrant deep blue and aquamarine with bright white highlights
A treasure chest overflowing with glowing blocks, warm wood brown and brass hardware with magical green glow spilling out
A swirling dimensional portal gateway with electric purple and magenta energy vortex inside a stone arch frame. Bright energy particles spiraling inward

constraintIcons.description: Three horizontal glowing lines stacked and shattering into fragments, vibrant electric blue with white energy sparks
A fist smashing through a geometric block, scattering angular debris, vibrant orange and red with bright yellow impact flash
A chain of three interlocking flame rings stacked vertically, vibrant orange and hot pink with yellow cores
A grid of blocks being pushed upward by rising arrows, vibrant green and lime with white arrow tips
A crossed-out magic wand inside a prohibition circle, vibrant red circle and slash over a grey-blue wand with dim sparkles
A horizontal warning cap line across a grid with a downward chevron, showing stacked blocks staying below the line, vibrant cyan grid with amber caution line and subtle glow

uiChrome.description: A wide horizontal bar for displaying game stats (score, level, moves). Dark semi-transparent with subtle ornate borders on top and bottom edges. Fantasy/tribal style.
A wide horizontal action bar for bonus buttons at the bottom of the screen. Dark semi-transparent with ornate borders. Slightly taller than hud-bar. Fantasy/tribal style.
A square button background for bonus ability icons. Dark circular/rounded-square shape with a glowing border ring. Fantasy/tribal style. Should look pressable.

panels.material: Warm brown wood planks — carved wooden frame with nail studs
Dark slate/iron — thin metallic border with rivets
Green plant matter — vine-wrapped edges with small leaves
Frosted glass — thin bright border, translucent center

particles.description: A bright spark/point of light — diamond-shaped glow
A small leaf shape — slightly curved
A tiny 5-petal flower — simple and symmetric
